revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Title missing]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 1337 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=<!--{{Title missing}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = title {{#ifeq:{{{partial|}}}|yes|incomplete|missing}} | title = Please supply either "|first=" and the actual title of the cited work, or use "|title=[untitled]" for intentional omission. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = <!--[[Category:All articles with broken citations]]--> | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }}<!--{{Title missing}} end-->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=<!--{{Title missing}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = title {{#ifeq:{{{partial|}}}|yes|incomplete|missing}} | title = Please supply either "|first=" and the actual title of the cited work, or use "|title=[untitled]" for intentional omission. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = <!----> | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }}<!--{{Title missing}} end-->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with broken citations]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
